summary.summary: Replaces the Treatments view gating for the bolus-in-progress card to rely on the local bolus progress signal instead of the pump-mirrored bolusStatus. The change introduces a bolusInProgressForEntry computed property that checks (state.bolusProgress != nil || state.bolusStatus == .initiating) and uses it for both displaying the bolus progress UI and disabling the task button; the previous carb/fat/protein dependency was removed from the gate (commit:3010265b28f8, diff:aa5ad5630445, commit:f6c21a412803). The PR and commit messages explain this addresses cases where a bolusing card could get stuck at 0% and block further boluses until app restart (pr:gordolio/Trio#1320, commit:3010265b28f8).
summary.userFacingImpact: Fixes an issue where a bolus-in-progress card in the Treatments view could remain stuck at 0%, block further boluses, and require an app restart to clear; the UI now gates on the reliably-cleared local bolusProgress signal and still preserves the initiating pre-delivery state so the pre-delivery view continues to show (pr:gordolio/Trio#1320, commit:3010265b28f8, diff:aa5ad5630445).
